title: lathyrus nevadensis var. pilosellus
intro: Lathyrus nevadensis var. pilosellus, commonly known as Nevada sweet pea or hairy pea, is a perennial legume native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus nevadensis var. pilosellus include relieving digestive issues, reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
